meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Students: Claude Code Skills Setup to Master AI Building
content.seo_description: Break through beginner plateaus. Learn how to set up Claude Code and Antigravity to build production-grade apps faster than ever. Perfect for student portfolios.
content.answer_block: To overcome the 'tutorial hell' plateau, you must shift from passive coding to agentic development. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you gain an autonomous engineering partner that handles boilerplate, architecture, and debugging. This setup transforms your workflow from manual typing to high-level system orchestration, accelerating your transition to professional developer.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks grinding through tutorials, yet every time you open a blank IDE, the cursor blinks back at you—a taunting reminder of the gap between 'following along' and actually building. You are stuck in the loop of basic apps, unable to bridge the distance between simple scripts and real-world, functional software that solves actual problems.

But the era of manual, line-by-line coding is ending. By leveraging Claude Code as an agentic partner and Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding, you aren't just learning to code—you are learning to architect. This is the shift from being a student who writes code to a builder who engineers solutions.

steps.title: Initialize the Agentic Environment
steps.description: Establish a secure, context-aware bridge between your local terminal and Claude’s reasoning engine.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project directory and create a structured README.md and .gitignore that follows industry best practices for a Node.js/TypeScript stack.

steps.title: Architecting the Data Layer
steps.description: Use AI to define your schema before writing a single line of implementation code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a relational database schema for a task management app, including user authentication and project relationships. Output as a Prisma schema file.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Generate a schema.prisma file based on the requirements defined in the docs folder.'

steps.title: Automated Boilerplate Generation
steps.description: Eliminate repetitive setup tasks by offloading the initial project scaffolding to your agent.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a clean API structure using Fastify, ensuring consistent error handling and logging middleware.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Create the directory structure and boilerplate files for a production-ready Fastify API.'

steps.title: Context-Aware Debugging
steps.description: Stop guessing why your code fails. Let Claude analyze the stack trace against your entire codebase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Examine the latest error log and cross-reference it with the service layer to identify the race condition.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Fix the bug in the auth middleware causing a 401 error on protected routes.'

steps.title: Refactoring for Scalability
steps.description: Transition from 'it works' to 'it scales' by applying senior-level patterns to your existing codebase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review my current service layer for SOLID principle violations and suggest a refactor to improve modularity.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Refactor the user controller into smaller, testable service modules.'

pro_tips: Always provide a 'Context Map' in your root directory to help Claude understand project dependencies instantly.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests *before* the implementation code to ensure TDD compliance.
Keep your context window clean by periodically clearing terminal history and summarizing project state.
Use Antigravity to generate documentation comments for every function to maintain a professional codebase.
Leverage Claude's 'Review' mode on every pull request to catch edge cases before you push to production.
content.next_steps: Once your first app is functional, deploy it using a CI/CD pipeline and add a 'Tech Stack' section to your portfolio highlighting the agentic tools used in the build.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting the blank screen dictate your potential. Master these tools, build your portfolio, and land your first engineering role. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
